case_title: FONTENBERRY, RICHARD JR. VS WELLS FARGO BANK

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22506, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONTENBERRY, RICHARD JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK $304.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $344.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONTENBERRY, RICHARD JR. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $454.00 FILED BY FONTENBERRY, RICHARD JR. AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
